name: Alejandro Abian
description: IT contractor based in Dubai. Specializes in hardware rollouts, infrastructure scaling, fractional IT operations, post-acquisition IT cleanup, and global team management across APAC and EMEA regions.

experience.description: Managed IT operations across Beijing, Shanghai, and regional APAC offices. Led technical assessments and team coordination.
Infrastructure and operations management. Led global office deployments, hardware rollouts, and VMware cluster procurement across European offices.
Started career in IT support and infrastructure.

projectExamples.name: Domain Consolidation & Acquisition Integration
projectExamples.description: Consolidated multiple child domains into a single root after acquisition. Managed user migration, hardware transport, and vendor renegotiation across regions.

projectExamples.name: Global Office Deployment & Infrastructure Upgrade
projectExamples.description: Led hardware deployment across European offices. Coordinated VMware cluster procurement. Oversaw networking, firewall, and security camera deployment.

projectExamples.name: Regional IT Team Management
projectExamples.description: Managed IT teams across Beijing, Shanghai, and other APAC locations. Conducted technical assessments and coordinated staffing.
